title: cornopteris atroviridis
intro: Cornopteris atroviridis, also known as the Atroviridis fern, is a species of fern native to Southeast Asia. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and supporting immune function. In herbal preparations, Cornopteris atroviridis is often used in teas, infusions, and decoctions, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
